title: Pholidia gilesii
taxonomy: Pholidia gilesii is classified as a species of moth in the family Gelechiidae. It is part of the order Lepidoptera. Gelechiidae is further classified as a family within the superfamily Gelechioidea. Lepidoptera is a larger order within the class Insecta and the phylum Arthropoda. Pholidia gilesii's classification helps in understanding its relationships with other moths and insects.
